n: Chapter 10.6: Leave The City Behind, Part Two

steps.t: You should speak with Hármelak about the status of the preparations. The Golden Queen is inside the Meeting-hall of Dâr Laja.
Hármelak has asked you to speak with the other members of the Kindred of the Coins in Dâr Laja.
With preparations for the journey delayed or otherwise obstructed, the Kindred has suggested that you gather at the east gate of the city and form an …
Sirgon is by the east gate of the city.
Belondor is by the east gate of the city.
